sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ الصِّدِّيقُ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ نَمُوذَجاً فَرِيداً فِي التَّصْدِيقِ وَالمُحَبَّةِ لِرَسُولِ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr es-Siddik, radijallahu anhu, bio je jedinstven primjer povjerenja i ljubavi prema Allahovom Poslaniku, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr as-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) was a unique model of belief and love for the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him).

sentences.arabic: فَعِنْدَمَا كَذَّبَ المُشْرِكُونَ النَّبِيَّ فِي حَادِثَةِ الإِسْرَاءِ، كَانَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ هُوَ الَّذِي أَعْلَنَ إِيمَانَهُ بِلَا تَرَدُّدٍ، مِمَّا جَعَلَهُ يَسْتَحِقُّ لَقَبَ «الصِّدِّيقِ».
sentences.translation: Kada su mušrici utjerivali Poslanika u laž povodom događaja Israa, Ebu Bekr je bio taj koji je bez oklijevanja proglasio svoje vjerovanje, čime je zaslužio nadimak 'es-Siddik' (Istinoljubivi).
sentences.translationEn: When the polytheists disbelieved the Prophet during the event of al-Isra, it was Abu Bakr who declared his faith without hesitation, which earned him the title 'as-Siddiq' (the Truthful).

sentences.arabic: يُبَيِّنُ الإِمَامُ ابْنُ القَيِّمِ فِي مُؤَلَّفَاتِهِ أَنَّ مَنْزِلَةَ الصِّدِّيقِيَّةِ هِيَ أَعْلَى المَرَاتِبِ بَعْدَ النُّبُوَّةِ، لِمَا فِيهَا مِنْ كَمَالِ الِاتِّبَاعِ وَيَقِينِ القَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Imam Ibnul-Kajjim u svojim djelima objašnjava da je stepen 'siddikijjeta' najviši stepen nakon poslanstva, zbog savršenstva slijeđenja i čvrstog uvjerenja u srcu.
sentences.translationEn: Imam Ibn al-Qayyim explains in his works that the status of 'Siddiqiyyah' is the highest rank after prophethood, due to the perfection of following and the certainty of the heart.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَبْخَلْ أَبُو بَكْرٍ بِمَالِهِ أَوْ نَفْسِهِ فِي سَبِيلِ نُصْرَةِ هَذَا الدِّينِ، بَلْ أَنْفَقَ كُلَّ مَا يَمْلِكُ طَلَباً لِمَرْضَاةِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr nije škrtario ni svojim imetkom ni životom na putu pomaganja ove vjere, već je udijelio sve što posjeduje tražeći Allahovo zadovoljstvo.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr was not stingy with his wealth or himself for the sake of supporting this religion; rather, he spent everything he owned seeking the pleasure of Allah.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ دِرَاسَةَ سِيرَةِ هَؤُلَاءِ العُظَمَاءِ تَمْنَحُ المُسْلِمَ القُدْوَةَ الحَسَنَةَ فِي الثَّبَاتِ عَلَى المَبَادِئِ وَالتَّضْحِيَةِ مِنْ أَجْلِ الحَقِّ.
sentences.translation: Proučavanje biografija ovih velikana pruža muslimanu divan uzor u postojanosti na principima i žrtvovanju za istinu.
sentences.translationEn: Studying the biographies of these great figures provides the Muslim with an excellent example of steadfastness on principles and sacrifice for the sake of truth.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي الخِتَامِ، يَبْقَى حُبُّ الصَّحَابَةِ وَالسَّيْرُ عَلَى نَهْجِهِمْ جُزْءاً لَا يَتَجَزَّأُ مِنْ عَقِيدَةِ أَهْلِ السُّنَّةِ وَالجَمَاعَةِ، فَهُمْ خَيْرُ القُرُونِ وَأَهْدَاهُمْ سَبِيلاً.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, ljubav prema ashabima i slijeđenje njihovog puta ostaje neraskidiv dio akide ehli-sunneta vel-džemata, jer su oni najbolja generacija i najispravnijeg puta.
sentences.translationEn: In conclusion, loving the Companions and following their path remains an integral part of the creed of Ahl al-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah, for they are the best of generations and the most guided in their way.
